title: Zero Map Markers
description: Removes ALL Map Markers from the game - handheld or in an item frame.
body:
A simple resource pack that does one thing - remove ALL map markers from the game. Great for doing redstone displays with maps, because they won't be obstructed in your hand or in an item frame. ![The map display I'm working on - Perfectly clean map!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/477bf8523c40474a977321be0f04b9b0ee9311f4_0.webp)

Derived from [No More Map Markers by TeaStrategist](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/no-more-map-markers). The only change I made was remove the handheld icons, because that pack only removed icons in item frames.
